title: SelfAware · Commission Theater
description: The self-repair loop on real silicon: trace waterfalls per commission (generate -> validate -> deploy -> test -> repair), outcomes, and verbatim board tracebacks. Skeleton dashboard — panel queries are finalized on build day against the live datasource UIDs (default otel-lgtm UIDs assumed: tempo / loki / prometheus).

panels.title: Commission traces — fail → repair → pass, as a waterfall
panels.description: Click a trace: commission > attempt > stage spans with the driver_author GenAI spans nested under stage=generate.

panels.title: Attempts to converge (by sensor)
panels.description: Build day: switch to a TraceQL metrics bar chart if the lgtm image ships Tempo's metrics-generator; this select()-table works either way.

panels.title: Board tracebacks — verbatim from the silicon
